    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<OutputStreamSerializer>
    SerializerSet.getStreamSerializer(String acceptHeader)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializer(String), but casts it to an OutputStreamSerializer.
    Optional<OutputStreamSerializer>
    SerializerSet.getStreamSerializer(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializer(MediaType), but casts it to a OutputStreamSerializer.
